== Neovim Keybinding Cheat Sheet

*Leader* = `Space` ¬∑ *LocalLeader* = `,` (in all language buffers)

=== Quick Reference

==== Navigation & Splits

[cols=",,",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action
|`Ctrl-h` |Normal |Move to left split
|`Ctrl-j` |Normal |Move to split below
|`Ctrl-k` |Normal |Move to split above
|`Ctrl-l` |Normal |Move to right split
|`Ctrl-‚Üë` |Normal |Shrink split height
|`Ctrl-‚Üì` |Normal |Grow split height
|`Ctrl-‚Üê` |Normal |Shrink split width
|`Ctrl-‚Üí` |Normal |Grow split width
|===

‚Üí xref:cheatsheets/navigation.adoc[Full reference]

'''''

==== File Tree (nvim-tree)

[cols=",,",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action
|`++<++leader++>++n` or `Ctrl-n` |Normal |Open file tree
|`Ctrl-t` |Normal |Toggle file tree
|`Ctrl-f` |Normal |Reveal current file in tree
|===

‚Üí xref:cheatsheets/file-tree.adoc[Full reference]

'''''

==== Terminal

[cols=",,",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action
|`++<++leader++>++t` |Normal |Toggle terminal split
|`Esc` |Terminal |Exit terminal insert mode
|===

‚Üí xref:cheatsheets/navigation.adoc[Full reference]

'''''

==== Editing

[cols=",,",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action
|`++<++` |Visual |Outdent selection and reselect
|`++>++` |Visual |Indent selection and reselect
|`++<++Tab++>++` |Visual |Indent selection
|`++<++S-Tab++>++` |Visual |Outdent selection
|`++<++S-Down++>++` |Visual |Move selected block down
|`++<++S-Up++>++` |Visual |Move selected block up
|`++<++leader++>++p` |Visual |Paste without overwriting clipboard
|===

==== System Clipboard

[cols=",,",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action
|`++<++leader++>++y` |Normal / Visual |Yank to system clipboard

|`++<++leader++>++Y` |Normal |Yank line to system clipboard

|`++<++leader++>++d` |Normal / Visual |Cut to system clipboard

|`++<++leader++>++p` |Normal |Paste from system clipboard (after cursor)

|`++<++leader++>++P` |Normal |Paste from system clipboard (before
cursor)
|===

Works on GUI Linux (xclip/xsel/wl-clipboard), WSL (win32yank.exe), and
SSH/TTY sessions (OSC 52 ‚Äî no external tool required).

‚Üí xref:cheatsheets/editing.adoc[Full reference]

'''''

[cols=",,",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action

|`gc` |Visual |Toggle comment on selection

|`Ctrl-/` |Normal |Toggle comment (Kitty / WezTerm)

==== Formatting (conform.nvim)

[width="100%",cols="34%,33%,33%",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action
|`++<++leader++>++f` |Normal / Visual |Format buffer or selection
(LSP-preferred)
|===

_Format-on-save is enabled for Lisp, Clojure, Scheme, Fennel, Janet, and
F++#++ buffers._

‚Üí xref:cheatsheets/formatting.adoc[Full reference]

==== Auto-Completion (nvim-cmp)

[cols=",,",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action
|`Alt-Space` |Insert |Open completion menu
|`Ctrl-n` |Insert |Select next suggestion (menu open)
|`Ctrl-p` |Insert |Select previous suggestion (menu open)
|`Enter` |Insert |Confirm highlighted suggestion
|`Ctrl-e` |Insert |Dismiss completion menu
|`Ctrl-f` |Insert |Scroll docs preview down
|`Ctrl-b` |Insert |Scroll docs preview up
|===

==== Git ‚Äî vim-fugitive {plus} gitsigns

[cols=",,",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action
|`++<++leader++>++gs` |Normal |Git status (`:Git`)
|`++<++leader++>++gb` |Normal |Git blame
|`++<++leader++>++gl` |Normal |Git log
|`++<++leader++>++gd` |Normal |Git diff (unstaged)
|`++<++leader++>++gp` |Normal |Git push
|`++]++h` |Normal |Next hunk
|`++[++h` |Normal |Previous hunk
|`++<++leader++>++hs` |Normal / Visual |Stage hunk
|`++<++leader++>++hr` |Normal / Visual |Reset hunk
|`++<++leader++>++hu` |Normal |Undo stage
|`++<++leader++>++hb` |Normal |Blame line
|===

==== Haskell (haskell-tools)

Leader is `Space`; no LocalLeader bindings are used in Haskell buffers.

[cols=",,",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action
|`++<++leader++>++rr` |Normal |Toggle GHCi REPL for package
|`++<++leader++>++rf` |Normal |Toggle GHCi REPL for current file
|`++<++leader++>++rq` |Normal |Quit GHCi REPL
|`Space-cl` |Normal |Run code lenses
|`Space-hs` |Normal |Hoogle search for type under cursor
|`Space-ea` |Normal |Evaluate all code snippets
|===

‚Üí xref:cheatsheets/haskell.adoc[Full reference] ¬∑ xref:guides/haskell.adoc[Guide]

'''''

==== F++#++ REPL ‚Äî iron.nvim

LocalLeader is `,` in F++#++ buffers.

[cols=",,",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action
|`,sl` |Normal |Send current line to REPL
|`,sc` |Normal / Visual |Send motion or selection to REPL
|`,sp` |Normal |Send current paragraph to REPL
|`,sf` |Normal |Send entire file to REPL
|`,s++<++CR++>++` |Normal |Send carriage return to REPL
|`,si` |Normal |Interrupt REPL
|`,sq` |Normal |Quit / exit REPL
|`,cl` |Normal |Clear REPL output
|===

‚Üí xref:cheatsheets/fsharp.adoc[Full reference] ¬∑ xref:guides/fsharp.adoc[Guide]

'''''

==== Lisp / Clojure / Scheme / Janet ‚Äî Conjure

LocalLeader is `,` in Lisp/Clojure/Scheme/Fennel/Janet buffers.

===== Evaluation

[cols=",",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Action
|`,ee` |Evaluate form under cursor
|`,er` |Evaluate root (outermost) form
|`,eb` |Evaluate entire buffer
|`,e!` |Replace form with its evaluated result
|`,cc` |Connect to REPL manually
|===

===== REPL Log

[cols=",",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Action
|`,lv` |Open REPL log in vertical split
|`,ls` |Open REPL log in horizontal split
|`,lq` |Close REPL log window
|===

‚Üí xref:cheatsheets/lisp.adoc[Full reference] ¬∑ xref:guides/lisp.adoc[Guide]

'''''

==== Structural Editing ‚Äî vim-sexp

[cols=",",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Action
|`++>++)` |Slurp forward ‚Äî pull next element into form
|`++<++)` |Barf forward ‚Äî push last element out of form
|`++<++(` |Slurp backward
|`++>++(` |Barf backward
|`++>++f` |Move current form right among siblings
|`++<++f` |Move current form left among siblings
|`++>++e` |Move current element right
|`++<++e` |Move current element left
|`cse(` or `cse)` |Surround element with `()`
|`cse++[++` or `cse++]++` |Surround element with `++[]++`
|`dsf` |Delete surrounding function call (splice)
|===

‚Üí xref:cheatsheets/lisp.adoc[Full reference]

'''''

==== Markdown

LocalLeader is `,` in Markdown buffers.

[cols=",",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Action
|`++<++CR++>++` |Follow link under cursor (mkdnflow ‚Äî opens target file)
|`++<++BS++>++` |Go back to previous file (mkdnflow)
|`++<++Tab++>++` |Jump to next link in buffer (mkdnflow)
|`++<++S-Tab++>++` |Jump to previous link in buffer (mkdnflow)
|`,p` |Toggle Markdown browser preview (single-file)
|`,sp` |Open in markserv Docker server preview (cross-page links)
|`,dp` |Export to PDF with PlantUML diagrams rendered
|`,mp` |MARP: open slide in preview server
|`,mx` |MARP: export to PowerPoint (`.pptx`)
|`,mh` |MARP: export to HTML
|`,md` |MARP: export to PDF
|`,cc` |Publish current file to Confluence
|`,cf` |Pull current Confluence page to local file
|`,ck` |Fetch Confluence comments to sidecar file
|`,ji` |Create Jira Task issue (prompts for summary {plus} description)
|`,js` |Create Jira Story (prompts for summary {plus} description)
|===

‚Üí xref:cheatsheets/markdown.adoc[Full reference] ¬∑ xref:guides/diagrams.adoc[Diagrams
guide] ¬∑ xref:guides/presentations.adoc[Presentations guide] ¬∑
xref:guides/confluence.adoc[Confluence guide] ¬∑
xref:guides/jira.adoc[Jira guide]

'''''
